courses.title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp 2024
courses.description: Master HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js and MongoDB. Build 15+ real-world projects from scratch and land your first dev job. This course covers everything from the very basics to advanced full-stack deployment.
courses.instructorBio: Senior Full-Stack Developer with 10+ years at Google & Spotify. Helped 50,000+ students land tech jobs.

courses.title: Advanced React & Redux Masterclass
courses.description: Deep dive into React hooks, Redux Toolkit, Context API, performance optimization, testing with Jest & RTL, and modern React patterns used at top tech companies.
courses.instructorBio: React Core Contributor. Ex-Facebook engineer. Author of 'Modern React Patterns' bestseller.

courses.title: CSS Mastery: Animations, Grid & Tailwind
courses.description: Build stunning, responsive UIs with CSS Grid, Flexbox, custom animations, and Tailwind CSS. Learn design principles that make your apps look professional and feel alive.
courses.instructorBio: UI/UX Designer & Frontend Architect. Design lead at Airbnb. Passionate about pixel-perfect interfaces.

courses.title: Python Programming: Zero to Hero
courses.description: Learn Python from absolute scratch. Master data structures, OOP, file handling, decorators, generators, and build real CLI applications. Perfect for beginners and career switchers.
courses.instructorBio: PhD Computer Science, MIT. Former Amazon engineer. Published researcher in programming language design.

courses.title: JavaScript: The Complete Modern Guide
courses.description: From variables to async/await, closures, prototypes, ES2024+, DOM manipulation, event loops, and modern JS design patterns. The only JS course you'll ever need.
courses.instructorBio: JavaScript engineer at Netflix. TC39 committee member. Speaker at JSConf, NodeConf.

courses.title: TypeScript: From Beginner to Expert
courses.description: Add powerful type safety to your JavaScript. Learn interfaces, generics, decorators, utility types, and integrate TypeScript into React, Node and Express projects.
courses.instructorBio: TypeScript contributor at Microsoft. Staff Engineer at Vercel. Author of TypeScript Design Patterns.

courses.title: Machine Learning with Python & TensorFlow
courses.description: Build and deploy production ML models. Cover regression, classification, neural networks, CNNs, RNNs, NLP, and model deployment with FastAPI and Docker.
courses.instructorBio: AI Research Scientist at DeepMind. PhD from Stanford. Published 30+ papers in top ML conferences.

courses.title: Generative AI & Prompt Engineering
courses.description: Master ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Midjourney and Stable Diffusion. Build AI-powered apps with LangChain, OpenAI APIs, RAG pipelines, and deploy to production.
courses.instructorBio: AI Product Lead at OpenAI. Built internal tooling used by 1M+ developers. AI educator & community builder.

courses.title: Computer Vision with OpenCV & PyTorch
courses.description: Object detection, face recognition, image segmentation using OpenCV, YOLO, and PyTorch. Build real-time vision systems and deploy them on edge devices.
courses.instructorBio: Computer Vision Lead at Tesla Autopilot team. PhD from Caltech. 15 years in applied vision systems.

courses.title: Full Stack MERN: Build & Deploy Real Apps
courses.description: Build complete, production-grade web applications with MongoDB, Express, React and Node.js. Learn authentication, file uploads, payments with Stripe and deploy to AWS.
courses.instructorBio: Senior Full-Stack Developer with 10+ years at Google & Spotify. Helped 50,000+ students land tech jobs.

courses.title: Rust Programming: Systems & Safety
courses.description: Master systems programming with Rust. Learn ownership, borrowing, lifetimes, concurrency, async Rust, and build high-performance CLI tools, web servers, and WebAssembly.
courses.instructorBio: Core Rust language contributor. Mozilla Research engineer. Building the future of safe systems software.

courses.title: NLP with Transformers & Hugging Face
courses.description: BERT, GPT-2, T5, LLaMA — implement, fine-tune, and deploy transformer models for sentiment analysis, text classification, summarization, and building production chatbots.
courses.instructorBio: AI Research Scientist at DeepMind. PhD from Stanford. Published 30+ papers in top ML conferences.
